languages.text: В неверном свете кажется, что причудливая тварь шевелится на своем постаменте. Маленькие глазки создания злобно таращатся в пустоту.

traits.locale_text: В неверном свете кажется, что причудливая тварь шевелится на своем постаменте. Маленькие глазки создания злобно таращатся в пустоту.

languages.text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.
languages.original_text: В неверном свете кажется, что причудливая тварь шевелится на своем постаменте. Маленькие глазки создания злобно таращатся в пустоту.

traits.locale_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.
In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.
In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

languages.text: Bajo esta extraña luz, la criatura parecía moverse en el pedestal. Los pequeños ojos de la criatura miran maliciosamente al vacío.
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: Bajo esta extraña luz, la criatura parecía moverse en el pedestal. Los pequeños ojos de la criatura miran maliciosamente al vacío.

languages.text: 在这诡异的光线下，那奇怪的生物似乎在基座上动了起来。它的小眼睛恶狠狠地瞪着空旷之处。
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: 在这诡异的光线下，那奇怪的生物似乎在基座上动了起来。它的小眼睛恶狠狠地瞪着空旷之处。

languages.text: Dans l'étrange lumière, la créature grotesque semble se mouvoir sur son piédestal. Elle fixe le vide de ses petits yeux malveillants.
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: Dans l'étrange lumière, la créature grotesque semble se mouvoir sur son piédestal. Elle fixe le vide de ses petits yeux malveillants.

languages.text: Garip yaratık, tuhaf ışık altında kaidesinin üzerinde hareket ediyor gibi. Yaratığın küçük gözleri, boşluğa kötücül bir şekilde bakıyor.
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: Garip yaratık, tuhaf ışık altında kaidesinin üzerinde hareket ediyor gibi. Yaratığın küçük gözleri, boşluğa kötücül bir şekilde bakıyor.

languages.text: 奇妙な光の中で、その奇妙な生き物は台座の上で動いているように見えた。その生き物の小さな目は悪意に満ちて空虚な空間を見つめている。
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: 奇妙な光の中で、その奇妙な生き物は台座の上で動いているように見えた。その生き物の小さな目は悪意に満ちて空虚な空間を見つめている。

languages.text: In dem seltsamen Licht schien sich die bizarre Kreatur auf ihrem Podest zu bewegen. Die kleinen Augen der Kreatur starren bösartig in den Weltraum.
languages.original_text: In the strange light, the bizarre creature seemed to move on its pedestal. The creature's small eyes stare malevolently into space.

traits.locale_text: In dem seltsamen Licht schien sich die bizarre Kreatur auf ihrem Podest zu bewegen. Die kleinen Augen der Kreatur starren bösartig in den Weltraum.
